creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just "testport" both misc/amanda-server and misc/amanda-client in poudriere 14.1 amd64 without errors.

"%%CLIENT_ONLY%%share/man/man7/amanda-auth.7.gz" is correct record.

> I know. But the plist says use/local/man/ that's why I opened this ticket.
What do you mean?

> By the way: the port needs to be changed from SF to GitHub....
The patch is welcome.
